description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be worn with everything: from casual jeans and tees, to skirts and dresses.UpperWide thong strap design covering the forefoot and extending to the midfoot for a snug Fit and great eye appealFabric lining for extra comfortFabric-lined footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
